channel.title: +सर्व-प्रस्तुतिः on यजुर्वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +सर्व-प्रस्तुतिः on यजुर्वेदे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: रुद्रदत्तः १-८
item.description: [[आपस्तम्बीयं-श्रौतसूत्रम् Source: EB]] [ [TABLE] . [TABLE] . PREFACE. ———— This edition of the Ápastamba Śrauta Sútra will be complete in four volumes. At the end will be added the indices necessary for such a work. The detailed investigation of the sources of the Ápastamba Sútra and its position among the ritual-books of Ancient India I shall reserve for the introduction to the last volume, the publication of which will place the entire material in the hands of Sanskrit scholars for criticism.
